title: HR Well Being Executive (Gov Healthcare, up to$5000, Events) #HCL
description:
Key Roles and Responsibilities

  • Collaborate with various internal/external stakeholders to develop, promote and implement Health Promotion/Intervention programmes and services for staff to improve their health status and well-being.
  • Plan and organise various hospital-level health, sports, and social recreational activitiesand events
  • Analyse post-health screening data to implement needs-based health promotion and intervention programmes. Track pre-post programme results to ensure successful health outcomes.
  • Engage and motivate staff to take charge of their health and overall well-being.
  • Undertake the Secretariat roles for both the Workplace Safety & Health Council and Well-being Committee to support the hospital efforts in developing and implementing the workplace safety and health framework and promote staff well-being
  • Support the Department’s digitalization efforts to improve connectivity with staff in accessing well-being initiatives and programs.
  • Manage and ensure the smooth running of the hospital’s sports and social recreational facilities
  • Collaborate to plan and promote cluster-level social/sports activities/competitions to encourage staff interaction & bonding
  • Assist with any other ad-hoc duties as required.

Requirements

  • A degree in Health Management & Promotion (Health Services Management, Sports & Wellness Management, etc) will be an advantage.
  • Minimum 2 years experience in health promotion, sports & events planning/management

If you are interested in the position, do kindly drop your most updated resume to kaileylee@recruitexpress.com.sg

Kailey Lee Jia Yueh

EA Personnel No: R24126040

Recruit Express Pte Ltd (Healthcare & Lifesciences Division)

EA License: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
